payload.claim: Based on Anthropic and Cloudflare's Code Mode MCP implementations, the primary mechanism for scaling Agent OS capabilities is 'Progressive Disclosure' via virtual filesystems. Instead of loading thousands of tool schemas into the LLM context window upfront, the Agent OS projects capabilities as a virtual filesystem (e.g. `/servers/google-drive/getDocument.ts`). The LLM uses its native bash/file-I/O training to `ls` and `cat` these virtual files to learn the schema on-demand, writes a transient script, and executes it. This reduces context consumption by >98% and keeps intermediate processing steps (like looping over 10,000 DB rows) out of the context window entirely.
